cover.era_chip: 日帝 强占 · 物産 · 民立
cover.subtitle:
조선 사람 조선 것으로,
비폭력의 또 다른 길.
cover.imagePrompt: Japanese-occupation era illustration, 1920s. ONE Korean middle-aged man (Cho Mansik reference) in white durumagi coat and round black hat, standing in a busy Pyongyang market street, holding up a bolt of plain Korean hand-woven cotton cloth with both hands, calm earnest expression. Around him: blurred silhouettes of Korean shoppers in white hanbok looking on. Behind him: a low wooden shopfront with hanging bolts of cloth and a single straw broom. Color: warm cream + earth-brown + dark blue-gray + faint amber morning light. Style: flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.

timeline.text: 경성제국대학 설립. 일제의 민립 운동 좌초 의도.
브나로드 운동. 동아일보 농촌 한글 보급.

items.name: 조만식
items.desc: 평양 출발, 토산품 애용 운동 선도.

items.title: 브나로드 한글
items.desc: 방학 중 학생들이 농촌에 한글 보급.

outro.tip_body: 심화 시험에서는 물산장려운동의 시작 도시(평양 1920)와 본부(서울 1923) 구분, 민립대학 모금 구호와 일제 대응(경성제대 1924), 동아일보·조선일보의 농촌 계몽 운동 명칭 매칭이 자주 출제.
outro.imagePrompt: Minimal hanji-beige background. CENTER: a stylized small bolt of Korean cotton cloth silhouette next to a tiny open book. RIGHT: a small plowed-field row silhouette suggesting rural enlightenment. Cream #F2EDE3 base + earth-brown #8B6F3A accent + faint teal #0D9488 line. Flat illustration, hand-drawn lines, simple shading, paper texture background. NO TEXT, NO LETTERS, NO NUMBERS, NO CAPTIONS, NO LOGOS anywhere in image. No realistic photo quality, no anime, no modern anachronism.
